claims.claim: Israeli VAT rate is 18% as of 2026 (raised from 17% in January 2025)

Allocation-number (mispar haktzaa) threshold for B2B tax invoices: NIS 10,000 from Jan 1 2026, NIS 5,000 from Jun 1 2026 (amount before VAT). Schedule: 25,000 (2024), 20,000 (2025), 10,000 (Jan 2026), 5,000 (Jun 2026).
claims.raw_snippet: From June 2026 the allocation number applies to invoices over NIS 5,000; the threshold was NIS 10,000 from January 2026. 10,000 5,000 10,000 ש"ח 5,000 ש"ח

claims.claim: Osek Patur (VAT-exempt dealer) annual turnover ceiling is NIS 122,833 for 2026 (CPI-adjusted annually)
claims.raw_snippet: תקרת המחזור השנתי לעוסק פטור עומדת על 122,833 ש"ח

claims.claim: Amutot (non-profits) issue donation receipts under Section 46 of the Income Tax Ordinance; individual donors get a 35% tax credit on the donation amount (subject to floor/ceiling limits)
claims.raw_snippet: זיכוי מס בשיעור 35% מסכום התרומה למוסד ציבורי מאושר לפי סעיף 46. Section 46 35%

claims.claim: Production base URL https://api.greeninvoice.co.il/api/v1, sandbox https://sandbox.d.greeninvoice.co.il/api/v1; auth is API key id+secret POSTed to /v1/account/token returning a JWT used as Authorization: Bearer (NOT OAuth2)
claims.raw_snippet: /account/token returns a JWT token used as Authorization: Bearer; https://api.greeninvoice.co.il/api/v1 https://sandbox.d.greeninvoice.co.il/api/v1 https://api.greeninvoice.co.il/api/v1/account/token https://api.greeninvoice.co.il/api/v1/users/me

claims.claim: REST endpoints under /v1: documents (create/search/get/close/download links), clients (CRUD + search), items (CRUD + search). Amounts are decimal shekels, not agorot.

13 document types (codes 10/100/200/210/300/305/320/330/400/405/500/600/610) and the paymentType enum (-1 Unpaid, 0 Withholding, 1 Cash, 2 Check, 3 Credit Card, 4 Bank Transfer, 5 PayPal, 10 Payment App, 11 Other)
claims.raw_snippet: type 305 Tax Invoice, 320 Tax Invoice/Receipt, 400 Receipt; paymentType -1 unpaid, 0 withholding, 1 cash, 2 check, 3 credit card, 4 bank transfer, 5 paypal, 10 app, 11 other

claims.claim: Export of services by an osek murshe is zero-rated (0% VAT) under Section 30 of the Israeli VAT Law, legally distinct from exempt (patur, Sec 31). In the Green Invoice API a 0% line is set via the income-row vatRate field (decimal 0), not a vatType value; the document-level vatType enum (DocumentVatType) is 0=Default, 1=Exempt, 2=Mixed at both document and row level.
claims.raw_snippet: vatType 0 Default, 1 Exempt, 2 Mixed; vatRate decimal e.g. 0.18; export zero-rated 0% Section 30 סעיף 30 not exempt

claims.claim: Official Green Invoice / Tax Authority / Bank of Israel reference URLs cited by the skill (all live; gov.il is bot-blocked to curl but renders for humans)

Illustrative calculation example values internal to the skill, NOT external regulatory claims: a NIS 10,000 service totals NIS 11,800 with 18% VAT; a withholding example where a client withholds 20% (NIS 2,000) leaving NIS 8,000 received. The 20% is an example withholding rate (actual rates vary by payee). Currency code ILS is used in JSON examples.
